---
title: "2. Collect & Manage"
description: "Implement FAIR data management, organize research outputs, maintain privacy, and ensure quality"
phase_order: 2
sidebar: training
page-layout: full
number-depth: 4
number-sections: true
number-offset: [0,2,0]
toc: false
css: handbook-styles.css
title-block-style: none
---

{{< include _collect-and-manage.qmd >}}
